# Once Human Helper - Full LLM Index

## Purpose
Neutral starter content for a template blog and knowledge site.

## Source of truth
- Markdown content in `content/`
- Behavior rules in `rules.yaml`

## Routes
- Home: https://b4rdack.github.io/once-human-helper/
- Search page: https://b4rdack.github.io/once-human-helper/search/

## Discovery and indexing
- Sitemap: https://b4rdack.github.io/once-human-helper/sitemap.xml
- Search JSON: https://b4rdack.github.io/once-human-helper/search.json
- LLM index: https://b4rdack.github.io/once-human-helper/llms.txt
